ೃ⁀➷ “No, im not falling for you; so please have mercy on me. ‘Cause it’s not romantic I swear; I’m not gasping for air; I want you to be here, but please don’t come near.”

Kinich doesn’t understand what he’s feeling whenever he’s around you, and Ajaw gets all angry and screams at him that he’s in love.
